song.title: You Are My King (Amazing Love)
song.author: Billy James Foote
song.lyrics:
[V1] .D/F# G2 Asus A I'm forgiven, because You were forsaken .D/F# G2 Asus A I'm accepted, You were condemned .D/F# G2 Asus A I'm alive and well, Your Spirit is within me . G2 A D Because you died and rose again
[V2] .D G Amazing love, how can it be .D Asus A That You my king would die for me? .D G Amazing love, I know it's true .D Asus A And it's my joy to honor You . G A D In all I do I honor You
[V3] .D D You are my king, You are my king .D D Jesus, You are my king, Jesus, You are my king
